textByHashes.ab37a262b3d423d91ca8b4b04ccd1f9f22a2ebff: Not really. We put a lot of effort into finding them, but nothing came of it.
textByHashes.a16b59278315820d9db40c45622e9f8587319902: Well, some say they got lost in the mountains. Others say they decided to go and live somewhere like Fortis instead of here. I'm not too sure myself. It is a large number of people who've vanished...
textByHashes.075f1f6b4691a97cfd3069cff4efc6484a348b5a: It was taking up a lot of resources. We don't have a huge number of guards here, so I need to use my people wisely.
textByHashes.5fb97e85a2da3ad691d887363b25d74412b38786: If we get a new lead, I'm happy to send them out again, but right now it's like looking for a needle in a haystack.
textByHashes.d48429e68937115b94231492f805d975bdbbbe8d: No. As I said, we tried looking, but found nothing. Without a new lead, things are at a dead end.
textByHashes.77523fe2b36cb0a664468deecbe62dcc72b503a0: Good day, traveller. Can I help you?
textByHashes.610be03c9fa9d02d167bb9ad49a5d96cf0cfa0c5: Hmm... I hadn't noticed them before. I don't think the ents leave that sort of thing. My guess would be one of the woodland creatures.
textByHashes.9df9aafbef9baa9a233648405c54115f1db440a4: Yes, I saw you bringing those boys back to town. Where did you find them?
textByHashes.57047cdeb704a524aadb3b120214deca6947a4ba: Ah, wonderful. This is just what we need.
textByHashes.7f0e5e4c869eea8f1e96bb38f36e121b74ddb691: Well, one of the people who went missing was the local fletcher. In his absence, our already light supply of longbows has become even lighter.
textByHashes.3ab662604afd97e602bd3e93b571cfaac801251e: That's right. We typically use willow longbows. We've lost a few experienced archers over the years so we've tried to make things more approachable... and cheaper.
textByHashes.3b7a996048205d200e5a16106d7bfe534dea07d7: Four would keep us comfortable for the time being.
textByHashes.d2636fca24cfe2b84e9365c2a9c2803f765b9c63: Making the most of the woodlands around here, were you?
textByHashes.417a14d04a14597dab3334c1d36750823dd7b8f8: Well, not really a lot. We'll increase the number of guards posted at the entrances into town, but without knowing what we're looking for, we can't do much else.
textByHashes.66661253ee8c00098310f6697054acc7958b0f9f: You're back. Have you sourced those willow longbows yet?
textByHashes.ac715bb2192cc7b384479c4350163763fc05f2ba: Traveller. Did you find out more about what happened to those boys?
textByHashes.1e53808816065119e2bc4f8301727813319e29a1: Well, without knowing what we're looking for, there's not much we can do.
textByHashes.b55380f7e682379518b4515eae4515a3e700e152: Antos? I'll get the guards ready, but that will take some time.
textByHashes.deef6b0996eea85da29d8c03610e0b126abc9978: You're mad, traveller! Good luck up there.
textByHashes.52d735c764fcc6beea802ba39f0a36583e3053fd: You found Antos! I never thought we'd see him again. What happened?
textByHashes.d3e8ecf6e10b6cec51237047f32a485a80fbf78f: I see... Did you find anyone else up there?
textByHashes.7fe8f0445c25de5ee98fdbe8a1d62f7473a9b787: That's... unfortunate. Still, from what you've said, I suppose we should be thankful that you found anyone still breathing.
textByHashes.b047049ec0bc2fcc946b4a113566c2bc56958658: Right, time to get to work I guess. Now that we know about these creatures and where they're coming from, we can hopefully ensure they don't take anyone else.
textByHashes.beb3bd4874d75cbca607985afc0ce6e4e6ca8a73: I suspect it's going to require us to establish a constant watch. Not ideal, but doable, especially with those new bows.
textByHashes.0ce65998b0f440ad264da5d8f21efc677058b678: Well, if you ever fancy heading up there and killing more of those creatures, you won't find me complaining. Apart from that though, I think you've done all you can.
textByHashes.1b84dec241e52e439e508c11a687df28e29b52a5: Thank you. All the best, traveller.
textByHashes.45b0a31d1e4787fea8c352da8923e91837de4a02: Hello again, traveller. We've been keeping an eye on the mountain pass to make sure those creatures don't come back. We haven't had any more disappearances, so it seems to be working.
textByHashes.2ab7e18bc272b237611f813b6a42070e660a637d: Still, we can't be too careful. If you ever fancy going up to that cave and killing a few of them for us, that would be appreciated.
textByHashes.3f9a1b71a80c04ff9d8dd268fd291f6dc129f006: Thank you, traveller. All the best.
